Indexed **{count} applicants** across your {jobs} jobs. Search by skills, experience, availability, or anything from their cover letter.

Try:
• "Show workers with React experience"
• "Find applicants available on weekends"
• "Who has plumbing skills?"
• "Workers who mentioned data analytics"

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach our support team for help with account, jobs, or payments.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: HyperLocal Jobs keeps pricing simple: workers can join for free, and employers pay only when posting verified jobs.
pricing.workersFree: Workers: Free profile creation and job applications
pricing.employersFeatures: Employers: Job posting and candidate matching features
help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Quick answers for common questions.
help.q1: How do I apply for jobs?
help.a1: Create a worker account, complete your profile, then apply from the Jobs page.
help.a2: Employers deposit funds into escrow, released after job completion confirmation.
help.a3: Use in-app support/report features or contact us directly.
guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Keep HyperLocal Jobs safe and useful for everyone by following these guidelines.
guidelines.rule1: Post accurate job descriptions and fair compensation details.
guidelines.rule3: Never request or share sensitive personal information unnecessarily.
guidelines.rule4: Confirm work completion honestly before escrow release.
guidelines.rule5: Report abusive or suspicious behavior immediately.
forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Reset your password using phone or email
landing.hero.subtitle: AI-powered matching, secure escrow payments, and verified employers — everything you need to thrive in your local job market.
landing.hero.community: Join 10,000+ workers and employers in your community
landing.features.title: Why Choose HyperLocal Jobs?
landing.features.subtitle: Built for local communities with trust, safety, and AI-powered convenience at the core.
landing.features.aiMatchingDesc: Personalized job recommendations based on your skills, experience, and availability.
landing.features.escrowDesc: Payments held securely until job completion. No fraud, no payment worries.
landing.features.chatDesc: Communicate securely without sharing personal contact information.
landing.features.trustScoreDesc: Build your reputation through ratings and successful job completions.
landing.features.hyperlocalDesc: Find opportunities right in your neighborhood or nearby areas.
landing.features.flexibleDesc: Part-time, full-time, gig work — choose what fits your schedule.
landing.howItWorks.title: How It Works
landing.howItWorks.subtitle: Simple steps to get started
landing.howItWorks.w1Desc: Create your account with phone verification
landing.howItWorks.w2Desc: Add your skills and availability for better matches
landing.howItWorks.w3Desc: Get AI-powered recommendations or search manually
landing.howItWorks.w4Desc: Apply to jobs and chat securely with employers
landing.howItWorks.w5Desc: Complete jobs and receive secure payments
landing.howItWorks.e1Desc: Create your business account with verification
landing.howItWorks.e2Desc: Describe your job requirements and pay
landing.howItWorks.e3Desc: Secure payment to make job visible to workers
landing.howItWorks.e4Desc: See matched candidates with AI scores
landing.howItWorks.e5Desc: Chat, select worker, and confirm completion
landing.safety.title: Your Safety is Our Priority
landing.safety.subtitle: Multiple layers of protection ensure a safe experience for everyone
landing.safety.s1Desc: Money is held securely and only released after job completion
landing.safety.s2Desc: All users verified with OTP to prevent fake accounts
landing.safety.s3Desc: Behavioral tracking ensures reliable users get priority
landing.safety.s4Desc: AI-powered detection of scams and suspicious activity
landing.safety.s5Desc: Easy reporting system for issues and 24/7 support
landing.safety.s6Desc: Community feedback helps identify trustworthy users
landing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
landing.cta.subtitle: Join thousands of workers and employers finding opportunities in their local community.
landing.footer.tagline: AI-powered local job matching platform connecting workers and employers.
landing.footer.copyright: © 2026 HyperLocal Jobs. All rights reserved. Built for local communities.
